text.title: Google Search Ads Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: Faion brand-defense ad group: 12 brand keywords, 3 RSAs with diversified headlines, target-CPA bidding, sitelinks + callouts + 1 structured snippet category.
example.note: All five rules satisfied; brand defense ad group ready to launch.
